infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow CartaraIQ to use the microphone for adding items by voice.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow CartaraIQ to recognize speech to add items to your list.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CartaraIQ does not use your photo library.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow CartaraIQ to use Face ID to keep your account secure.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: CartaraIQ uses the local network to connect to development servers.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow CartaraIQ to use the microphone for adding items by voice.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow CartaraIQ to recognize speech to add items to your list.
